# A Letter Concerning Toleration

*[John Locke](../philosophers/locke.md) · 1689*

A plea for the separation of state and church. Locke argues that sincere faith cannot be coerced, that the magistrate has no authority over the salvation of souls, and that religious toleration is required by both the Gospel and reason.
